reason: Confirms flutter build web + flutter test are the truth signals; flutter analyze skipped on CJK path.

Establishes what the bottom-nav swap was supposed to do — needed to know exactly which lines belong to that contract and must be reverted, vs. what belongs to other parts of the polish task that stay.
The previous tween-direction fix lives in the same code block being removed; the revert subsumes that fix cleanly (no need to selectively preserve it).
